content.rendered:
Kids Toys Wholesale --Wholesale Kids Toys Online

  • Poxst Service helps you buy direct from the factory
  • Poxst Service supplies one-stop toy buying service.
  • Poxst Service negotiates with the china wholesale distributor for you
  • Poxst Service helps you sourcing and shipping your toys.
  • Poxst Service helps you find China toy manufacturers.

China Toys Wholesaler

Table of Contents

Download this page as a PDF

To save you time, we have also prepared a PDF version containing all the contents of this page, only leave your email and you will get the download link immediately.

Kids Toys Supplier -- Poxst Service

We are a company that values customers’ satisfaction. We always aim at sourcing and delivering quality toys that meet all your needs.

With 10 years of experience, Poxst Service is very professional in this toys industry. Yes, you are dealing with a professional toys wholesale distributors. You can trust them to meet your needs and expectations.

We have a professional toy sourcing service team that can help you wholesale toys directly from factories, giving you a one-stop sourcing service.

  • We are certified; Poxst Service is CE and EN71 certified.
  • We will make sure that we provide you with only high quality toys.
  • The toys we offer will pass a strict quality control before being allowed to be shipped.
  • We, as a brand, are authentic in all our dealings.
  • Our team, at all times, looks forward to serving you.

Want to know how we can do business? Let’s talk!

Get A Quote

Kids Toys List

Buying direct from China toys factory.

Wholesale toys list of China Baby Toys

Baby toys are the one of most popular toys for kids. Most Baby Toys are made in Shantou. We have selected safe baby toys for you from China baby toy manufacturers and all products are certified.

as your toys buying agent, we help you to buy toys directly from Baby Toys manufacturers and help you Shipping to your country.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China barbie dolls

Barbie dolls are mainly produced in Shantou and Jieyang, two cities you must know if you want to wholesale Barbie toys from the factory. 

In addition to the thousands of Barbie dolls you can choose from, you can also customise your one barbie dolls.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China Beach Toys

Beach toys are a favourite toy for all children, especially in summer. In China, almost all beach toys are produced in Shantou and Yiwu.

You toys buying agent have selected for you hundreds of hot selling beach toys from beach toy manufacturers and all at factory prices.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China Building Blocks Toys

When it comes to building blocks, apart from Lego, there are many other great building block brands in China. Shantou have most toy manufactueres who produce building blocks.

You can find all types of blocks such as buildings, racing cars, cartoon characters, Chinese palaces and much more. Best of all, you can wholesale toys directly from the factory.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China Drones

China is the origin of drones. The main manufacturers of drones in China are located in Shenzhen and Shantou. Here you can buy all types of drones, those with HD cameras, mobile phone remote control, live video recording and so on.

By working intensively with Chinese drone manufacturers, we help you to wholesale your drones directly from the drone factory at a price lower than the factory price.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China Game Toys

Game toys are one of the must-have toys for parties. In China, game toys suppliers are mainly concentrated in Shantou and Yiwu.
We help you wholesale directly from game toys factories, while we help you source the hottest game toys from factories at low prices

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China Inflatable Toys

The most famous brands of inflatable toys are bestway and Intex, both of which have factories in China. As agents for bestway and Intex inflatables, we can help you source inflatables from China at the lowest possible price.

You can check out our online catalogue or of course contact us to pick up the latest inflatables catalogue.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China jigsaw puzzle Toys

Jigsaw puzzles are definitely one of the most popular toys of 2020. China is a world producer of jigsaw puzzles and here you can buy a wide range of different types of puzzles such as landscapes, people and you can even customize and design your own puzzle. 

You can start by viewing our selection of puzzles for you and if you need a bespoke puzzle, you can contact us and we will connect you with a factory.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China kids arts and craft Toys

Kids arts and craft is one of the best toys for developing children’s creativity. In China you can buy kids arts and craft at Shantou Toy Market and Yiwu Toy Market.
We have selected hundreds of kids arts and craft from toy factories for you, but of course if you already have a toy you want to buy, you can send it to us and we will contact the factory for you.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China metal toys

If you’re interested in building blocks, then you won’t want to miss the metal toys. In Shantou, you can find many metal toy manufacturers. Most of these metal toys can be made into cars, animals, houses and so on.

As metal toys supplier, we offer a wide range of metal toys and you can check out our online catalogue.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China Outdoor Toys

Outdoor toys are mainly concentrated in Yiwu and Shantou. You can purchase a small amount of toys in Yiwu toy market. Of course if you want to purchase directly from the factory, then Shantou toy factory is your most fake choice.

We have selected popular outdoor toys for you from Shantou toy manufacturers. You can check the catalogs

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China fidget Toys

Party favor is also fidget toys, which are generally given to children as gifts at parties. To wholesale party favor in China, you can purchase it in Yiwu market. This is because there are factories from all over the country.

Of course, if you want to buy from factories in large quantities, then Shantou toy factory is the best choice for you.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China pretend play toys

Pretend play toy is one of the most popular toys toys for children. If you want to wholeale all the pretend play toy from China, then Yiwu is best for you.
If you want to purchase directly from pretend play toy manufacturers, then Yunhe and Shantou are your best choices. Yunhe mainly produces wooden pretend play toys, while Shantou mainly produces plastic pretend play toys.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China RC cars Toys

RC car is mainly produced in Shantou. You can source RC car directly from toy manufacturers in Shantou. There are thousands of RC car toys manufacturers here.
Meanwhile, as your toy buying agent, we have some of the most popular RC car for you, you can check our catalog first.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China Riding Toys

Riding toy is one of the indispensable toys for children growing up. If you want to import riding toy from China, Yiwu toy market is your best choice. Here you can choose from a variety of different styles of riding toys.
Of course, if you want to purchase directly from the factory, you can find out the style you want first, as they are produced in Shantou and Hebei respectively.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China STEM Toys

Stem toys factories are concentrated in Zhejiang province, so if you want to import Stem toys from China, Yiwu toy market is your best choice, where you can find Stem toys manufacturers.
We have compiled a list of the hottest Stem toys for you, you can check our catalog for the first time.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China Surprise Toys

Surprise toys quickly became popular in the world after LOL toys. Of course, besides the expensive LOL, you can buy all kinds of Surprise toys in China, and Shantou is the city with the most Surprise toys suppliers, so if you want to buy Surprise toys from China, Shantou is your best choice.
We have compiled some Surprise toys for you, you can check them out by clicking

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China Water gun Toys

Water guns are one of the best-selling toys in summer, and Shantou is your best choice for importing water guns from China, as almost all the water gun factories are concentrated in Shantou.
Meanwhile, of course you can click to learn more about the most popular water guns.

VIEW CATALOG

Wholesale toys list of China Wooden Toys

In China, wooden toy factories are mainly concentrated in Yunhe, Zhejiang Province. If you want to import wooden toys directly from the factory, then wooden toys suppliers in Yunhe are your best choice.
We have selected hot toys from wooden toy manufacturers’ side, you can click and learn more.

VIEW CATALOG

China Toys Wholesale Market
Buy Kids toys wholesale

Yiwu Toys Market

#1. One of the largest China toys wholesale market;

#2. Located in Yiwu International Trade Mart District 1;

#3. More than 2,000 stores and 2000 toys suppliers;

#4. Fabric Plush Toys, Electric Toys, Inflating toys, regular toys, etc..

Shoutou Toys Market

#1. The production base of toys in China;

#2. More than 12,000 toys factories and manufacturers;

#3. Unique exhibition hall mode, choose toys like shopping in the supermarket;

#4. Factory outlets, you can get the quotation list including factory details;

GUIDE TO TOYS MARKET

Wholesale toys online

wholesale toys online, buying toys from the China Toys factory directly.

Previous
Next

Factory Directly Buying

All Chinese toys are sold directly from Chinese toy factories, we just help you to get the best price and help you to ship out.

Millions of Chinese toys

There is a collection of millions of Chinese toys that you can find in various categories. Almost all the toys you can find here.

Complete Toy Certificate

Our toy certificates are EN71, CE, GCC, ASTM, Amazon CPC, IEC, BSCI and all other certificates. All you need to do is search for the certificate to locate the product you want.

Get the quotation with one click

You can search the name of the toy, the name of the certificate, you can also picture search toys; you can directly click the shopping cart button to add to the shopping cart, you can also directly click to view the product specifications information. Finally when you have confirmed the toy you want, submit the inquiry form directly in the shopping cart. We will sort out the quotation form to you within 3 working days.

Get A Quote

china toys wholesale website

List of China wholesale sites to help you better find reliable China toy suppliers.

Alibaba

Alibaba is a search engine for Chinese suppliers, and you can reach tens of thousands of suppliers at once. Just enter what you are looking for in the search bar, and Alibaba will return a batch of suppliers, prices, and MOQ.
View Now

AliExpress

AliExpress is an online retail service that connects Chinese sellers with buyers from around the world. You can find individual sellers trading items or wholesale companies. It's a great sourcing resource for small buyers.
View Now

YiwuGo.com

Yiwugo.com is the online website of Yiwu International Trade City, and each store on it corresponds to each market store. So if you want to contact Yiwu suppliers directly, then you can find it directly on it.
View Now

Made-in-China

Unlike other B2B marketplaces in China, this site loads faster and provides a broad catalog with few repeats. Mainly concentrated on consumers, Clothing, accessories, handicrafts, transportation, other commodities, electronics, machinery, and other industrial supplies.
View Now

DHgate

DHgate.com is a Chinese B2C and B2B service cross-border company that facilitates business between suppliers and medium and small buyers. Just like Alibaba, you will find lots of similar products being provided at different wild prices. You can check more: Is Dhgate safe?
View Now

Global Sources

Global Sources is a B2B marketplace based in Hong Kong. They facilitate business from China to the rest of the world by offering sourcing information to buyers. It achieves this in various ways, including having a list of categories and popular trade shows accessible to buyers.
View Now

Estimated wholesale price of Kids Toys

All the money paid to Poxst Service for the purchase of their products is secure. Below is an outline of costs you will incur:

Service commission

We charge a 3-5% commission on our services to help you source toys directly from toy manufacturers.

Shipping Fee

This is the amount of money that you will pay for the transportation of your products from the factory to your doorstep. Poxst Service offers you the convenience of any kind.

Printing Plates Fee

When you customize your packing of toys, whether add a logo or custmizing your design, the printing plate needs to be recreated.

Sample Product Fee

Pay a minimal amount in case you need a sample toy. Well, this money is for a single sample, if it is one that you need. With several samples, you’ll pay a bit more.

30% T/T Fee

You can decide to either pay the full amount or pay 30% of the full payment for the wholesale.
 

70% Final Fee

Complete your payment within a certain period and receive the products you ordered for.

Estimated Souricng and shipping times

We work fast. With the increasing number of customers approaching us, we have no other option but to prioritize speed. Let’s look at the whole process of sourcing and shipping:

STEP 1：
Require A Quote

Send us a request for quote and our toy sourcing agents will help you with everything you need to import toys from China.

STEP 2：
Products Sourcing

Your toy sourcing agent will give you a catalog or quote. If you provide pictures and information about the toys you want to buy, your sourcing agent will help you find a factory and get a quote for you.

STEP 3：
Confirm Orders

Once you have confirmed your order, your sourcing agent will help you contact the Chinese toy manufacturer to help you arrange the production of your order according to your requirements.

STEP 4：
Arrange Production

We will deliver your order to the factory. If there is any problem in the order arrangement and production process, we will communicate with you promptly.

STEP 5：
Quality Inspection

When all production is completed, your purchasing agent will go to the factory and help you check the quality of the toys one by one and whether they meet your requirements. Finally, he will send you the inspection report.

STEP 6：
Loading and Shipping

Finally your China sourcing agent will contact your shipping agent, or contact his own shipping agent to help you arrange the container and finally help you load and ship it out.

Things you Need to Know When Import China Kids Toys

To save you from worries, here are some facts you need to know about our toys wholesale service:

Do you offer free shipping of wholesale toys?

Unfortunately, no. You will have to pay a small fee for shipping wholesale toys. As for the specific shipping cost, we confirm the number of products to be purchased and then confirm the shipping method before we can calculate the shipping cost.

What am I supposed to do if my wholesale order delays?

If your order is late for more than a week, email Poxst Service customer care on the website to be assisted further.

Kindly note that sometimes the orders can delay because of unavoidable circumstances. Just be patient and we will let you know if there is a valid reason for the delay.

Can you replace products that are damaged during shipping?

It happens on rare occasions because we ensure that all our products are well-packaged before being shipped.

But in case it does, please contact customer care on the website. They will guide you and advise you accordingly.

How long does it take for me to receive the goods that I've ordered?

Usually within 3 weeks if no customization on the products, but It may take up to 30 working days if the shipping company stock in trouble.

Will you protect my business information?

Sure, we will never display our customer’s products and information.

How do you control the product’s quality?

The complete production process and more than 10 years of production experience will control the product quality of each link. Strict QC team will check all products before delivery, take photos and send them to our customers for confirmation.

Can you provide OEM/ODM services?

Yes ,sure. Please send your logo, artwork and require details. We can do OEM for you and offer customized package.

What is your payment terms?

T/T 30% deposit in advance and the balance should be paid before shipment.

Contact Poxst Service to Start Your Business

Have a look at how some of our clients perceive our goods and services:

Garron from U.S.
Read More
I have been working with Poxst Service for 5 years, from the time we met at the Canton Fair 5 years ago to now. I am very satisfied with their professionalism and for me they are the best toys factory in China
John Doefrom Canada
Read More
I have been to the factory of Poxst Service, their factory is very large and professional. All my products need customized packaging, and their design team can always turn my ideas into perfect products, which brings me great help in sales.
Helen McCarthyfrom Mexico
Read More
I have compared many Chinese toys factories, Poxst Service makes me most satisfied. They can provide me toys with high-quality and the cheapest prices. Cooperating with them makes my job easier.

Next
